/usr/bin/c++ -O2 -g -DNDEBUG -arch arm64 -Wl,-search_paths_first -Wl,-headerpad_max_install_names -L/opt/homebrew/opt/openssl@3/lib CMakeFiles/zk_proof_systems_ram_zksnark_test.dir/zk_proof_systems/zksnark/ram_zksnark/tests/test_ram_zksnark.cpp.o -o zk_proof_systems_ram_zksnark_test  libsnark.a ../depends/libff/libff/libff.a /opt/homebrew/lib/libgmp.dylib /opt/homebrew/lib/libgmp.dylib /opt/homebrew/lib/libgmpxx.dylib -lcrypto
